properties.ExtractProcessedIds: SELECT study_uid AS id FROM FLOWFILE

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT ImageSeriesUID as series_uid, ImageSeriesNumber as series_number, Description as series_description, Manufacturer as series_manufacturer
FROM eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imageseries WHERE processed = FALSE;

properties.Replacement Value: UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imageseries SET processed = TRUE WHERE ImageSeriesUID IN ( ${'$1':replaceAll('"', "'")} )
UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagestudy SET processed = TRUE WHERE ImageStudyUID IN ( ${'$1':replaceAll('"', "'")} )

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT Id, ImageStudyUID, ImageSeriesUID, KVP, XRayTubeCurrent, Exposure, ExposureTime, SpiralPitchFactor, FilterType, ConvolutionKernel, SliceThickness, PixelRowSpacing, PixelColSpacing, ImageRows, ImageColumns
FROM eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagetags WHERE processed = FALSE;

properties.Replacement Value: UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagetags SET processed = TRUE WHERE id IN ( ${'$1':replaceAll('"', "'")} )

properties.ExtractProcessedIds: SELECT Id AS id FROM FLOWFILE

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT ImageStudyUID as study_uid, OffsetFromDiagnosis as study_offset_from_diagnosis, OffsetUnitEUCAIM as study_offset_unit, ImagingTimepoint
FROM eucaim_cdm_ingestion.imagestudy WHERE processed = FALSE;

properties.ExtractProcessedIds: SELECT series_uid AS id FROM FLOWFILE
